1.title: The Beginning
prose: You stand at the start of the test campaign.
This scene verifies that the campaign loader correctly loaded scenes.json from a different campaign folder.
The purple theme confirms theme.json loaded correctly.

choices.text: Skip to the ending (test direct jump)

2.title: The Middle
prose: You have successfully navigated to scene 2.
This confirms scene transitions work correctly across campaigns.

boxes.text:
**TEST ROLL:** Roll 1d20 + STR modifier | DC 10
**SUCCESS:** You pass the test.
**FAILURE:** You still pass, because this is just a test.

END.title: Test Complete
prose: Congratulations! The multi-campaign engine is working correctly.
• Campaign loader fetches from the correct folder
• Theme applies correctly (purple instead of gold)
The engine is ready for additional campaigns.
